name: My Favorite Ice Box Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together.
2. Add the egg, vanilla, and chopped walnuts to the mixture.
3. Mix by hand until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Form the dough into one or two rolls and refrigerate.
5. When ready to bake, cut the rolls into thin slices (about half the size of a dime).
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 4 minutes.
7. Watch carefully as they tend to burn easily.
8. Cool for 30 seconds before removing from the cookie sheet.
